testcase.name: test_health_endpoint_responds
testcase.failure: tests/test_controller_refactoring.py:41: in test_health_endpoint_responds assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 520 E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 520 assert 520 in [200, 301, 302, 307, 308] + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected error handling response, got 520 assert 520 in [400, 401, 403, 404, 422] + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code
